entry.title: IDC VA797H17D0022 (P00030) awarded to PHILIPS NORTH AMERICA LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE SUPPLY OF RADIOLOGY AND IMAGING SYSTEMS, SUBSYSTEMS, AND COMPONENTS ALONG WITH MAINTENANCE SERVICES, TRAINING, AND INCIDENTAL SERVICES RELATED TO THE PURCHASE OF THE IMAGING EQUIPMENT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
